title: [codereview-pass1] coap_status.c comments
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:4-9 - Doxygen header and section separators violate no-comment rule. Remove all non-SPDX comments. Also fix uint8_t map_count calculations causing -Wconversion warnings at lines ~246,267,297,330,457.
